---
name: Bug Report
about: Report something that isn't working correctly
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **OS:** [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04]
- **Browser:** [e.g. Chrome 125, Firefox 126, Electron desktop]
- **Version:** [e.g. commit hash or release tag]
- **Mode:** [Local-only / Cloud (Supabase)]

## Additional context

Any other context about the problem (console errors, network tab, etc).
